title: impl: space_set_update
description:
What: Implement space_set_update in space.rs.

Algorithm:
1. space_set_update(&self, session, input: &SpaceUpdateInput<'_>) -> Result<SetResponse, ClientError>
2. Build patch Map:
   - name: Option<&str> → insert if Some
   - description: Option<Option<&str>> → nullable pattern
   - icon_blob_id: Option<Option<&str>> → nullable pattern (key='iconBlobId')
   - is_public: Option<bool>
   - is_publicly_previewable: Option<bool> (key='isPubliclyPreviewable')
   - add_members: &[SpaceAddMemberInput] → if non-empty: build [{id, roleIds:[...]}] array. roleIds key omitted when None.
   - remove_members: &[&str] → if non-empty: array of strings
   - update_members: &[SpaceUpdateMemberInput] → if non-empty: [{id, roleIds:..., nick:...}], nullable nick with Some(None)=null
   - add_channels: &[SpaceAddChannelInput] → if non-empty: [{name, optional fields}]
   - remove_channels: &[&str] → if non-empty
3. args = json!({accountId, update: {input.id: Value::Object(patch)}})
4. build_request('Space/set'), call, extract

Add SpaceUpdateInput and sub-types to import in space.rs.
Run cargo fmt, clippy, test. Close bead.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; space_set_update in space.rs; clippy clean
